Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 5}Next, I'm going to explain a tactic for defeating several enemies at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}First, go ahead and strike an enemy's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}I'll keep track of tactical data such as any enemy weaknesses you've identified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 5}If you ever forget an enemy's affinities, just let me know and I'll get that data for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 5}All right, now knock down the other one. That's when you perform an All-Out Attack.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 5}It's a maneuver that engages the entire team in a coordinated assault when all enemies have been knocked down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 5}Naturally, the enemy has no way of defending against this. It's one of the most reliable means of attack.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 3}Whoa! That sounds so badass! Let's give it a try right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 0 5}One other thing I should mention, though: as obvious as it sounds, you can't perform an All-Out Attack alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_733_0_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 0 5}So, if you want it in your arsenal, you'll need at least two members available in the fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_733_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pressing the L1 button will allow you to view the affinities of a selected enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_733_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This allows you to confirm which attack affinities you've used on that specific enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_733_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When all enemies are knocked down, you will have the option to perform an All-Out Attack. This deals heavy damage to all enemies, so try and knock down enemies as often as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_733_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All-Out Attacks cannot be performed with only one available party member. You will also be unable to perform All-Out Attacks if you are afflicted with certain status ailments.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_733_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After winning a battle, there is a rare chance of Shuffle Time occurring. During Shuffle Time, your potential will be shown in the form of cards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_733_3_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Depending on the card you choose, you can receive various rewards.[n]{f 1 1}
